content: Dezhao is a Master student at the Institute of Information Engineering, Chinese Academy of Sciences. His research interests are feature learning, video processing and information security. He specializes in extracting video features with self-supervised manner. His previous work provided an effective insight for the domain of self-supervised learning. 罗德昭是个帅气又聪明的男孩子

title: Dezhao Luo
